name: census
description: U.S. Census (ACS) data by ZIP: income, demographics, housing, education.
long_description: An MCP server that puts U.S. Census American Community Survey (ACS) data by ZIP code inside your agent. Look up income, demographics, housing, and educational attainment for any ZIP; compare several ZIPs by one metric; or reverse-lookup the ZIPs within a place. Read-only and built on public Census data — bulk-downloaded once into a local store, then served instantly offline. A free Census API key is required for the one-time download.

census_api_key.title: Census API Key
census_api_key.description: Free key from https://api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html — used only for the one-time ACS data download.

tools.name: lookup_zip
tools.description: Validate a ZIP maps to a Census ZCTA; returns name and population.

tools.name: get_income
tools.description: Median household income, per-capita income, and the % of households earning $200k+.

tools.name: get_housing
tools.description: Median home value, median gross rent, and owner-occupied share.

tools.name: get_education
tools.description: Of adults 25+, the % with a bachelor's+ and the % with a graduate degree.

tools.name: compare_zips
tools.description: Rank several ZIPs by a single metric, highest first.

tools.name: find_zips
tools.description: Reverse lookup: the ZIPs within a place, ranked by land coverage.

tools.name: get_acs_variable
tools.description: The raw value of any stored ACS variable, by code or friendly name.
